Variable.name: event
Variable.Description: The IdentityChangeEvent. It can be used to build the provisioning plan, but does not need to be persisted with the case, so marked as transient.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Variable.name: event
Variable.Description: The IdentityChangeEvent. It can be used to build the provisioning plan, but does not need to be persisted with the case, so marked as transient.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Step.name: Compile Delete Plan - GSuite
Step.Description: Compiles a Provisioning Plan to delete GSuite links. As this event only occurs 61 days after a leaverDate has been set, all GSuite links (falling under CWR or EMP OUs) associated with the Identity are deleted. This step also generates a custom Audit Log entry each time a relevant link is added to the plan.

Step.name: Execute Delete Plan
Step.Description: Calls the Provisioner API to execute seamlessly execute passed in Provisioning Plan.
